odejs\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.11 in;C:\Users\2401a\.cargo in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\2401a\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;;C:\Users\2401a\AppData\Local\spicetify;C:\Users\2401a\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\2401a\AppData\Roaming

testcase.name: testConvert_allOperators
testcase.system-out: ConstantsLoader: Initiating constants loading process... ConstantsLoader: Cache loaded from C:\Users\2401a/.scientific_calculator/cached_constants.json ConstantsLoader Debug: Constants loaded from cache: 19 constants. ConstantsLoader: Constants loaded successfully from local cache. InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '3' (Last Token Type: START) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '+' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '4' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '*' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '2' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '/' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '(' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '1' (Last Token Type: PAREN_OPEN) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '-' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '5' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: ')' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '^' (Last Token Type: PAREN_CLOSE) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '2' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Infix: [3, +, 4, *, 2, /, (, 1, -, 5, ), ^, 2] -> Postfix: [3, 4, 2, *, 1, 5, -, 2, ^, /, +]

testcase.name: testConvert_constants
testcase.system-out: InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: 'PI' (Last Token Type: START) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as CONSTANT InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '*' (Last Token Type: CONSTANT) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '2' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Infix: [PI, *, 2] -> Postfix: [PI, 2, *]

testcase.name: testConvert_functions
testcase.system-out: InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: 'sin' (Last Token Type: START) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '(' (Last Token Type: FUNCTION) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '3' (Last Token Type: PAREN_OPEN) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: ')' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '+' (Last Token Type: PAREN_CLOSE) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: 'cos' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '(' (Last Token Type: FUNCTION) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '4' (Last Token Type: PAREN_OPEN) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: ')' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Infix: [sin, (, 3, ), +, cos, (, 4, )] -> Postfix: [3, sin, 4, cos, +]

testcase.name: testConvert_simpleAddition
testcase.system-out: InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '3' (Last Token Type: START) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '+' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '4' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Infix: [3, +, 4] -> Postfix: [3, 4, +]

testcase.name: testConvert_unaryMinus
testcase.system-out: InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '-' (Last Token Type: START) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Converted '-' to UNARY NEGATION (NEG) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '3' (Last Token Type: FUNCTION) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '+' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '4' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Infix: [-, 3, +, 4] -> Postfix: [3, NEG, 4, +]

testcase.system-out: InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '(' (Last Token Type: START) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '3' (Last Token Type: PAREN_OPEN) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '+' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '4' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: ')' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '*' (Last Token Type: PAREN_CLOSE) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '2' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Infix: [(, 3, +, 4, ), *, 2] -> Postfix: [3, 4, +, 2, *]

testcase.name: testConvert_operatorPrecedence
testcase.system-out: InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '3' (Last Token Type: START) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '+' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '4' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '*' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '2' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Infix: [3, +, 4, *, 2] -> Postfix: [3, 4, 2, *, +]
